post_text: Most small business owners are paying for AI tools they don't know how to use. Here's the real problem:
thread_tweets: It's not the tool. It's that nobody showed them what to actually do with it.|The prompt matters more than the platform.|I've done 40+ sessions. Same mistake every time: vague instructions to a powerful tool.|Fix the input. Fix the output.

post_text: 'I don't have time to learn AI' is the most expensive sentence in small business.
I tested 8 AI writing tools last month. Here's the only ranking that matters (thread):
thread_tweets: 1/ Claude — best for long-form, tone matching, complex tasks|2/ ChatGPT — best for quick back-and-forth brainstorming|3/ Grammarly AI — best for polish after a Claude draft|4/ The rest — marketing tools with AI bolted on. Skip them.
